no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: Evidence-package reachability is fixed locally, but the required project-wide gate still fails in unrelated cmd integration tests before this bead can be cleanly closed. `go test ./...` reports execute-bead cleanup metadata failures in `cli/cmd/agent_execute_bead_e2e_test.go` and `cli/cmd/execute_bead_e2e_routing_test.go`, plus a stale default-library warning path that emits 404s for `v0.4.7`. Those failures are outside `internal/evidence` and the bead scope forbids modifying the needed cmd/runtime files here.
